# Resources.IsUriTemplate method

Returns `true` when *value* conforms to the URI Template grammar of [RFC 6570]. Delegates to [`IsUriTemplate`](../UriTemplate/IsUriTemplate.md). (§17.4, R-17.4-m)

```csharp
public static bool IsUriTemplate(string? value)
```

| parameter | description |
| --- | --- |
| value | The candidate URI-template string. |

## Return Value

`true` when the value is a well-formed RFC 6570 template.
